title: Body Parsing, Raw Webhooks, Forms, Multipart Uploads, and Byte Limits · Narrowing Workshop
summary: A backend pairing room predicts runtime, request, middleware, dependency, response, and cleanup transitions before assembling the first bounded body ownership and parser matrix for body parsing, raw webhooks, forms, multipart uploads, and byte limits. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of bounded body ownership and parser matrix while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidenc…
objectives: Configure express.json type, limit, inflate, strict, reviver, and verify behavior while treating req.body as undefined until parsing succeeds.
Enforce declared, compressed, decoded, field-count, nesting, and semantic-size budgets before expensive parsing or effects.
Preserve exact raw bytes for signature verification while separating timestamp, replay, media type, decode, validation, and enqueue decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Express Json Limit Inflate Verify
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop team handles case 8362 in a public incident API behind one regional edge proxy. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to bound declared and decoded bodies while preserving exact signed webhook bytes; preserve response ownership after a client abort; then rotate a signing key while an old valid session remains within policy. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Configure express.json type, limit, inflate, strict, reviver, and verify behavior while treating req.body as undefined until parsing succeeds.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Express Json Limit Inflate Verify.

For Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Express Json Limit Inflate Verify, keep Express Json Limit Inflate Verify connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
